heading: Exemptions for religious nonmedical health care institutions
label: 1320c–11 Exemptions for religious nonmedical health care institutions
text: The provisions of this part shall not apply with respect to a religious nonmedical health care institution (as defined in ).section 1395x(ss)(1) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1320c–11, , as added , , ; amended , , §§ 922(a), 927(b), , 2630; , 97–35, title XXI, § 2113(h), , related to Statewide Professional Standards Review Councils, prior to the general revision of this part by .act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XI, § 1162Pub. Amendments1997— substituted “Exemptions for religious nonmedical health care institutions” for “Exemptions of Christian Science sanatoriums” in section catchline and substituted “religious nonmedical health care institution (as defined in )” for “Christian Science sanatorium operated, or listed and certified, by the First Church of Christ, Scientist, Boston, Massachusetts” in text.Pub. L. 105–33section 1395x(ss)(1) of this title
